title: NovaBorn - Women's Fitness & Empowerment
seoTitle: NovaBorn - Women's Fitness & Empowerment - Free Fitness Website Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: Fitness programs designed by women, for women. Strength, confidence, and community.
summary: Fitness programs designed by women, for women. Strength, confidence, and community.
description: Fitness programs designed by women, for women. Strength, confidence, and community.
prompt: Build a premium fitness website inspired by NovaBorn - Women's Fitness & Empowerment. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
NovaBorn
Programs Why Us Stories Pricing
Programs Why Us Stories Pricing

Become Your Most Powerful Self

Women-led fitness. Female coaches. Inclusive community. Built for your strength, inside and out.

Fitness Programs Built for Women

Find what resonates with you

Strength Sisterhood

Build real strength without intimidation. Progressive training designed for women's physiology.

  • 3-4x per week
  • Female coaches
  • Supportive community
MOST LOVED

Cardio & Dance

High-energy workouts that celebrate movement. Feel strong, empowered, and joyful.

  • 4-5x per week
  • Dance & cardio mix
  • Mood boosting

Yoga & Balance

Find your center. Flexibility, balance, and inner strength through mindful movement.

  • 3-5x per week
  • All levels
  • Stress relief

Why Women Choose NovaBorn

More than fitness. It's sisterhood.

All-Female Coaching Team

Learn from women who understand your body, your goals, and your journey.

Body-Positive Community

Zero judgment. Every body is a strong body. We celebrate all shapes and sizes.

Women's Health Expertise

Programs designed for hormonal cycles, pregnancy, postpartum, and menopause.

Real Results

Thousands of women getting stronger, healthier, and more confident daily.

On-Demand Workouts

Train anytime, anywhere. Work with your schedule, not against it.

Live Q&A & Support

24/7 access to expert coaches. Your questions matter. We're here for you.

Questions?

We've got answers

Perfect! Our beginner programs are designed for anyone starting from zero. Our coaches meet you where you are and progress at your pace. Most beginners feel confident and strong within 2 weeks.

Most workouts are 30-45 minutes. We also have quick 15-minute sessions for busy days. Choose what fits your life. Consistency matters more than duration.

No equipment needed! We offer bodyweight options for all programs. You can add dumbbells or resistance bands if you want, but they're optional.

Absolutely! Many members combine Strength Sisterhood with Yoga & Balance. Our coaches can help you build a balanced weekly routine.

150K+

Strong Women

50+

Female Coaches

4.8★

App Rating

97%

Retention Rate

Real Women, Real Power

Hear from members who transformed

"Never thought I could be this strong. The female coaches get it. No judgment, only encouragement. This community changed my life."

Jessica Martinez

Strength Sisterhood

"As a busy mom, I needed flexibility. These workouts fit my life. I'm stronger, healthier, and my confidence is through the roof!"

Sarah Thompson

Cardio & Dance

"The yoga program helped me during postpartum recovery. Expert guidance for women's health. Truly caring coaches. 10/10 recommend!"

Amanda Chen

Yoga & Balance

Affordable Strength

Choose your path

Starter

Try it out

$9 /month
  • Limited class library
  • Basic tracking
MOST POPULAR

Premium

Everything you need

$19 /month
  • All programs
  • New classes weekly
  • Community access
  • Progress tracking

Elite

VIP experience

$49 /month
  • All Premium features
  • 1-on-1 coaching calls
  • Priority support
  • Personalized plan

Your Strongest Self Awaits

Join 150,000 women building strength, confidence, and community.

NovaBorn

Women's strength. Women's community.
